name: RK Beach
description: Popular city beach and promenade along the Bay of Bengal, good for a relaxed morning or evening visit.

name: Kailasagiri
description: Hilltop park with sea views, gardens, viewpoints, and a ropeway experience.

name: INS Kurusura Submarine Museum
description: Museum inside a decommissioned submarine near RK Beach, showcasing naval life and equipment.

name: Yarada Beach
description: Scenic beach near green hills, suited for a quieter coastal outing.

name: Rushikonda Beach
description: Well-known beach for sea views, water activities, and a breezy coastal stop.

name: Dolphin's Nose
description: Distinctive rocky viewpoint and lighthouse area overlooking the coastline.

name: Simhachalam Temple
description: Historic hill temple dedicated to Lord Narasimha, known for architecture and pilgrimage significance.

name: VUDA Park
description: Family-friendly urban park near the beach with lawns, paths, and leisure spaces.

name: TU 142 Aircraft Museum
description: Museum built around a retired naval aircraft, located close to the beach museum circuit.

name: Thotlakonda Buddhist Complex
description: Ancient Buddhist monastery ruins on a hill with coastal views and archaeological interest.

name: Visakha Museum
description: Local museum with exhibits about Visakhapatnam's maritime, colonial, and regional history.

name: Borra Caves
description: Limestone cave system in the Araku Valley region, often visited as a day trip from Visakhapatnam.
